mapper.select: select * from batch.file_channel_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false limit 1
mapper.update: update batch.file_channel_config set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update batch.file_channel_config set is_deleted = true, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_channel_config ( tenant_id, channel_code, channel_name, channel_type, target_endpoint, auth_type, config_json, receipt_policy, timeout_seconds, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.channelCode}, #{p.channelName}, #{p.channelType}, #{p.targetEndpoint}, #{p.authType}, #{p.configJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.receiptPolicy}, #{p.timeoutSeconds}, #{p.enabled}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update batch.file_channel_config set channel_name = #{p.channelName}, channel_type = #{p.channelType}, target_endpoint = #{p.targetEndpoint}, auth_type = #{p.authType}, config_json = #{p.configJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, receipt_policy = #{p.receiptPolicy}, timeout_seconds = #{p.timeoutSeconds}, enabled = #{p.enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{p.tenantId} and id = #{p.id}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_channel_config ( tenant_id, channel_code, channel_name, channel_type, target_endpoint, auth_type, config_json, receipt_policy, timeout_seconds, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.channelCode}, #{p.channelName}, #{p.channelType}, #{p.targetEndpoint}, #{p.authType}, #{p.configJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.receiptPolicy}, #{p.timeoutSeconds}, #{p.enabled}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, channel_code) do update set channel_name = excluded.channel_name, channel_type = excluded.channel_type, target_endpoint = excluded.target_endpoint, auth_type = excluded.auth_type, config_json = excluded.config_json, receipt_policy = excluded.receipt_policy, timeout_seconds = excluded.timeout_seconds, enabled = excluded.enabled, updated_at = current_timestamp
